items.title_en: Nintendo hikes Switch 2 prices and expects console sales to decline as memory crunch bites
items.title_zh: 任天堂提高 Switch 2 价格并预计游戏机销量将因内存短缺而下降
items.desc_en: Nintendo said the price of the Switch 2 in the U.S. will rise  from $449.99 to $499.99. In Japan, Nintendo will hike the price from 49,980 yen to 59,980 yen.
items.desc_zh: 任天堂表示，Switch 2 在美国的售价将从 449.99 美元上涨至 499.99 美元。在日本，任天堂将价格从 49,980 日元提高到 59,980 日元。

items.title_en: French prosecutors escalate probe of Elon Musk and X to criminal investigation

items.desc_en: France is investigating whether Elon Musk and his social media app X were complicit in spreading harmful AI deepfakes.
items.desc_zh: 法国正在调查埃隆·马斯克和他的社交媒体应用程序 X 是否参与传播有害的人工智能深度伪造品。

items.title_en: These banks just raised their CD rates. Where to find the highest yields
items.title_zh: 这些银行刚刚提高了存款利率。哪里可以找到最高产量
items.desc_en: Morgan Stanley expects rates on certificates of deposit to be flat to slightly higher in the near term.
items.desc_zh: 摩根士丹利预计短期内存款证利率将持平或略高。

items.title_en: Iran war market jitters offer silver lining for investors
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争市场的紧张情绪为投资者带来一线希望
items.desc_en: Market volatility offers investors a good time to reexamine if their stock allocations align well with their risk tolerance.
items.desc_zh: 市场波动为投资者提供了重新审视其股票配置是否与其风险承受能力相符的好时机。

items.title_en: Trump's 'irresponsible war' to blame for economic slowdown, German minister says
items.title_zh: 德国部长称特朗普的“不负责任的战争”是经济放缓的罪魁祸首
items.desc_en: Finance Minister Lars Klingbeil blamed the US president's "irresponsible war in Iran" for harming the Germany economy.
items.desc_zh: 财政部长拉尔斯·克林贝尔指责美国总统“不负责任的伊朗战争”损害了德国经济。

items.title_en: Here's what to expect from Friday's release of the April jobs report
items.title_zh: 以下是周五发布的四月就业报告的预期
items.desc_en: The total picture is one of a labor market that, while undoubtedly cooling, is generally stable and resilient despite a number of challenges.
items.desc_zh: 总体情况是，劳动力市场虽然无疑正在降温，但尽管面临许多挑战，但总体稳定且富有弹性。

items.desc_zh: Meta表示Ofcom的计算“不成比例”； the regulator said it would defend its position.

items.desc_zh: 这位前大学讲师是政府和执政的卢旺达爱国阵线党的直言不讳的批评者。

items.desc_zh: 以色列媒体报道称，由于与哈马斯的谈判陷入僵局，以色列正准备恢复战斗。

items.title_en: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations
items.title_zh: 前 OpenAI 董事会成员表示埃隆·马斯克愿意捐献她的精子
items.desc_en: Shivon Zilis is the mother of four of Musk's children. That relationship began as she advised OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: Shivon Zilis 是马斯克四个孩子的母亲。这种关系始于她为 OpenAI 提供建议时。

items.title_en: Robot wars - what an operation in Ukraine tells us about the battlefield of the near future
items.title_zh: 机器人战争——乌克兰的一次行动告诉我们关于不久的将来的战场
items.desc_en: After Ukraine's President Zelensky said territory had been captured using just robots and drones, what is the future of unmanned warfare?
items.desc_zh: 在乌克兰总统泽伦斯基表示仅使用机器人和无人机就占领了领土之后，无人战争的未来是什么？

items.title_en: Apple to pay $250m to iPhone buyers over AI features lawsuit
items.title_zh: 苹果因 AI 功能诉讼向 iPhone 买家支付 2.5 亿美元
items.desc_en: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.
items.desc_zh: 去年的指控称，这家科技公司的 Apple Intelligence 广告欺骗了 iPhone 买家。

items.title_zh: Pornhub 将再次对一些英国用户开放

items.desc_zh: 完成 Apple 基于设备的年龄检查的英国 iPhone 用户将不再被阻止访问该网站的成人内容。

items.title_en: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡称人工智能演员、编剧不能获奖
items.desc_en: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.
items.desc_zh: 周五，负责奥斯卡颁奖典礼的学院针对人工智能在电影中的使用发布了新的获奖资格要求。
